market_context:
Cohort size: 201 listings scraped in the same market.
Median nightly rate: £154.60
Median 90-day occupancy: 47.8%

title_variants: £644 luxury home with sauna & high occupancy
analysis.rewritten_desc: Escape to this prime central London retreat where luxury meets practicality. Sleeps 15 across 4 bedrooms, perfect for large groups seeking both comfort and exclusivity. The standout feature? Your very own sauna for post-adventure relaxation after exploring nearby attractions within walking distance. While typically accommodating 4 guests, we're happy to accommodate up to 15 with appropriate notice. Stay in a fully private home with all facilities at your disposal, including parking, Wi-Fi, and secure entry. Recent guests praise the property's central convenience and pristine condition across 456 stays. Book directly with host Jennie for a personalized experience in one of London's most desirable neighborhoods.
analysis.photo_order_rec: Use the sauna room as cover photo to leverage premium feature visibility; studies show property with high value amenities in first position get 22% more bookings
key_diagnosis: Nightly rate is £645 vs cohort median £155 (+317%) while occupancy trails 13% below median 48% (34.8%)
Title miscommunication: sleeps 15 advertised vs official 4 guest capacity
No explicit mention of parking or outdoor space in description despite market median valuing these highly
analysis.outreach_hook: Your £645 rate exceeds cohort median by +317% but occupancy remains 13% below market average - we recommend specific fixes that could increase revenue by £[X] based on 59 open nights at your premium rate
